name: Trout Almondine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt the 1/3 cup butter.
2. Microwave for 30 seconds.
3. Add almonds and microwave uncovered for 3 minutes or until lightly browned; stir occasionally. Set almonds aside.
4. Arrange fish in a shallow, 10-inch, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish.
5. Place 1 tablespoon of butter on each fish and sprinkle with lemon juice and salt and pepper to taste.
6. Microwave covered for 7 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
7. Spoon browned almonds over fish and microwave uncovered for 2 minutes or until heated through.
